title: eragrostis neesii
intro: Eragrostis neesii, also known as Desert Lover Grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the southwestern United States, particularly in Arizona and New Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Eragrostis neesii include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and even help manage blood sugar levels. The herbal preparations of Eragrostis neesii typically involve drying the leaves and flowers, which can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use.
